Take complete control of your favorite county and guide them through a challenging, multi-season legacy. From midnight training sessions to high-stakes summer afternoons, every choice you make will echo through the stands. Will you lift the ultimate silverware, or will the county board hand you your walking papers?

KEY FEATURES AT LAUNCH (v1.0)

newReleases.name: SKUNK'D®: Solo Dice Challenge
newReleases.desc:
Sniff that? It’s the sweet smell of victory—or the stinky scent of getting SKUNK’D!

Welcome to SKUNK'D®: Solo Dice Challenge, the fast-paced, high-stakes digital adaptation of the popular push-your-luck family dice game. If you love dice rollers, risk-taking, and climbing the leaderboard, grab your cup and get ready to roll!

HOW TO PLAY:
1. Roll 6 dice. Score points by rolling 5s,Skunks, or special combinations (Stripes, Polecats, Megas, and the legendary Carbuncles!).
2. Put your points on the board to lock them in, or push your luck and roll the remaining dice to score even more.
3. Watch out! If you roll the dice and fail to score any points, you get SKUNK'D and lose all your points in the Den for that turn.
4. Push your luck to the limit, rack up massive points, and climb the global leaderboards to claim bragging rights over your friends!

KEY FEATURES:
• PUSH YOUR LUCK: Classic, addictive risk-reward dice gameplay that keeps you on the edge of your seat.
• SOLO CHALLENGE: Score as many points as you can, build massive combos, and chase the ultimate high score.
• FRIEND CHALLENGES: Challenge your friends directly in asynchronous Best-of-3 or Best-of-5 match series. Set a high score on your board and see if they can beat it!
• GLOBAL LEADERBOARDS: Compete with players worldwide. See where you rank among the top stinkers globally, and of course amongst your friends!
• PREMIUM MASCOT & VOICEOVER: Play along with Whiff, our animated mascot, featuring high-fidelity custom an

newReleases.name: Pyramid Khepri 13
newReleases.desc:
If you enjoy matching games, you’ll love Pyramid Khepri 13.

The daily challenges feature a unique reward system that lets you win gem-studded crowns and trophies while competing against other players on the leaderboard. New daily challenge rewards are unlocked every day. Simply tap the "PLAY NOW" button to access each challenge.

This puzzle game stays fresh and challenging. Embark on a new legendary journey, complete challenges, and collect unique badges. You’ll face constant new challenges to train your brain and sharpen your skills! Enjoy unlimited daily play with this unique and challenging free solitaire game. It’s highly engaging—but remember, you still need to find the right moves to beat the challenge!

Try unique solitaire challenges and train your brain with this classic Pyramid Solitaire game (also known as the "13" game).

How to play this classic free Pyramid Solitaire game:
Pair up cards that add up to 13. J = 11, Q = 12, K = 13. Combine cards that total 13 to remove them from the board. Use the draw pile to help find the cards you need. Clear the board to win the game!

Challenge yourself to reach the top of the pyramid and clear as many boards as possible. Train your brain with this classic solitaire game.

Download Pyramid Khepri 13 now and enjoy one of the best and most popular solitaire games around!

newReleases.name: PourPop: Water Puzzle
newReleases.desc:
Relax and unwind with PourPop — a cozy collection of water puzzles you can play at your own pace. No timers, no fail states: just satisfying pours and that quiet click when everything lines up.

Pour water between tubes until each one holds a single color. Simple to learn, delightfully tricky as the puzzles grow.

THREE WAYS TO PLAY
- Color Sort — pour to gather every color into its own tube
- Measure — combine and pour jugs to hit an exact target amount
- Decant — split and share water to reach the goal

Hundreds of handcrafted levels ramp smoothly from gentle warm-ups to clever brain-benders. Stuck? Grab a hint, undo a move, or add an extra tube — it's your puzzle, your pace.

FEATURES
- 400+ levels across three puzzle modes
- A smooth difficulty curve — never a wall, never a bore
- Hints, undo and helpful boosts when you want them
- A daily challenge to keep your streak alive
- Earn coins, unlock achievements, track your stats
- Calm, candy-soft visuals and soothing sounds
- 100% offline — no account needed

Pour, sort, measure, relax. Pop a few puzzles whenever you need a quiet moment.

newReleases.name: Pathlings
newReleases.desc:
Every walk is an adventure waiting to happen. Pathlings is a cozy step-tracking game where your daily steps become XP, quests, and progress for a tiny buddy you'll actually care about.

CHOOSE YOUR BUDDY
Pick from three starter companions — the nature-loving Sprout, the fiery Ember, or the whimsical Bubble. Name them, walk with them, and watch them evolve through five stages as you hit your goals.

WALK TO GROW
Pathlings connects to Apple Health to count your real steps. Every day you walk, your buddy earns XP. Hit milestones along today's adventure path, complete quests, and unlock snacks and toys to keep your buddy happy.

BUILD YOUR STREAK
Stay consistent and your streak compounds — each day of a streak earns streak × 5 bonus XP on top of your quest rewards. Miss a day? Streak Shields protect your progress so one bad day doesn't reset everything.

YOUR PACE, YOUR GOAL
Set a daily step goal that fits your life — gentle, balanced, or ambitious. Pathlings grows with you, not against you.

No subscriptions. No ads. Just you and your buddy, one walk at a time.

newReleases.name: ChibiNekoPuzzlePark
newReleases.desc:
ChibiNeko Puzzle Park is a cozy park-themed puzzle collection guided by adorable ChibiNeko characters. Three puzzle modes in one app. Japanese and English supported.

【Three Puzzle Modes】
■ NekoPatch
Place shape pieces to fill the grid. L- and T-pieces included. Long-press to rotate; number hints help you along the way.

■ NekoQueens
Place one kitty queen in each row, column, and color zone—without diagonal neighbors. A colorful logic puzzle with a feline twist.

■ NekoZip
Draw a trail from ① through numbered nodes and visit every cell in the park. Avoid walls and route through treat cells for extra fun.

【Random Mode 】
Tap Random in any mode for a freshly generated puzzle every time. Reset to get a brand-new layout. Endless replayability beyond the fixed stages.

【Features】
• 5 fixed stages per mode + random generation
• Free to play (ads supported, no in-app purchases)
• Free hints + optional rewarded ads for extra hints
• Star ratings based on clear time
• BGM toggle, undo, and reset
• Privacy Policy, Terms, and Support in Settings

【Perfect for】
• Quick brain breaks
• Logic puzzle fans
• Cat lovers who enjoy cute, casual games

Fill the park with puzzles—ChibiNeko is waiting!

newReleases.name: Meowdoku!
newReleases.desc:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.

Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
Simple Rules, Deep Strategy

The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!

Key Features
• Pure & Immersive Experience
• Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
• Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.

Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.

updates.name: Yarn Loop: Knit Puzzle
updates.desc:
Yarn Loop is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game featuring colorful yarn bobbins and knitted patterns.

Bobbins move onto the conveyor and collect stitches of their own color. Each bobbin has a capacity value that decreases as stitches are picked up. When its capacity reaches zero, the bobbin disappears. If capacity remains, the bobbin is transferred to the rack and can be used again later.
 
Complete each knitted pattern by using the right bobbins in the right order.

Game Features
► Simple One-Tap Gameplay: Bobbins move smoothly through the conveyor system and collect matching stitches with ease.
► Color-Based Collection Mechanic: Each bobbin clears only the stitches of its own color.
► Capacity Management System: Every bobbin has a limited pickup value, creating thoughtful and satisfying puzzle decisions.
► Rack Reuse Function: Bobbins that still have capacity return to the rack and remain available for later use.
► Hundreds of Engaging Levels: New knitted layouts, color combinations, and puzzle arrangements appear throughout progression.
► Cozy Yarn Aesthetic: Soft textures, warm colors, and pleasant animations create a calm and enjoyable experience.

Yarn Loop offers a smooth, calm, and visually charming journey through handcrafted yarn puzzles.
updates.releaseNotes: Good news, players — the latest update is here! We’ve squashed bugs, boosted performance, and added fresh polish to keep the fun going strong.

updates.name: Zen Word® - Relax Puzzle Game
updates.desc:
Playing Zen Word 10 minutes a day brings you incredible challenging and relaxing experiences.
 
Zen word is a challenging word game & brain game that helps to train your brain and sharpen your mind. Zen Word is much more challenging than most other word puzzle games. Unlike crossword puzzles games or word cross games or word scramble games, all words in Zen Word are uncrossed, without any logical connection that can give you hints to help you solve the puzzles.  In Zen Word, you need to search and connect the right letters to find 20 hidden words on average in each level to test your vocabulary. The length of the words is the only clue that will help you find all the words and solve the puzzles. Therefore, Zen Word has very high requirements for your vocabulary and spelling skills. All word puzzles in Zen Word are carefully designed and will definitely give you a completely different challenging experience. 

Also, Zen Word is very different from word-search games. In word search games, your objective is to find and mark all the words hidden inside the letters box. The arrangement of these words in word-search games has clear rules, even if you don't know the spelling of the words, you can still search and find all the hidden words to solve the puzzles. As you find more words, the difficulty of word search games gets easier. However in Zen Word, as you find more words, the difficulty of the game will increase sharply. The rest of the words are extremely hard for you to rememb

updates.name: Amaze GO!
updates.desc:
Welcome to Amaze GO! A clean arrows puzzle game built to calm a busy mind. Every arrow points the way — what you need to do is to choose the right order. The design cuts visual noise, reduces chaos, and helps you organize thoughts as you play. Pick up an arrow. Find its lane. Repeat until the grid is yours. Enjoy the quiet flow offline anywhere and anytime.

What makes Amaze GO! great
1. Streamlined arrows puzzle that declutters the screen and the mind
2. Works offline with a clean interface that keeps attention on the board
3. Calm play loop for smart brains: think clearly, move each arrow with strategy
4. Smooth tap controls, clear path feedback, and satisfying release moments like ASMR

How to Play
- Find an arrow with a free path to the edge
- Tap to slide that arrow off the grid and open a lane for the next move
- Plan the order to secure a safe route and a clean board
- Long-Press to use Guidance to highlight directions when your path is unclear
- A wrong tap costs a heart for the level
- Clear the board to finish the level and aim for a perfect run
- Hints help focus when the grid feels tight

Why love this arrow puzzle
· Simple rules, profound strategy, and a meditative arrows puzzle
· Short breaks ease stress and sharpen focus
· The last arrow leaves the board with a satisfying mental reset
· Cognitive workout for sequencing and brain teasers
· Quiet visuals, plus a satisfying whoosh as each arrow flies off the grid — feedback that soothes instead of nags

Made for t

updates.name: Pixel Flow!
updates.seller: Loom Games Oyun Yazilim ve Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
updates.desc:
Conveyor’s ready, pigs are on standby. Tap to send a pig onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Pigs only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The pigs are ready. The cubes… not so much.

THE FORGE

CLIMB THE LADDER

updates.desc:
All in Hole is the oddly satisfying black-hole puzzle where you guide Molly the mole on a snack-swallowing adventure. Slide a tiny hole, devour small objects to grow, and use playful physics to gobble every target treat. Whether you’re here to zen out or chase trophies, All in Hole serves up quick, colorful levels that feel great to master.

Why you’ll love it
- Smooth, tactile physics — swipe, scoop, and watch the hole snap up anything in its path
- Smart goals — sort and swallow only what’s required to clear the puzzle
- Relax or compete — chill at your own pace or enter limited-time tournaments and climb the leaderboard
- Team up — join a crew to chat, share hearts and coins, and earn sweet bonuses together
- Yummy progression — collect ingredients, unlock recipes, and decorate cakes
- Handy boosts — grab energy and time helpers for tough stages
- Fresh drops — regular events and new levels

How to play
- Drag to move the black hole
- Eat small items to grow larger
- Swallow the target treats to finish the level

Tips from Molly
- Look ahead: plan a clean route so you don’t block yourself
- Prioritize: gulp the light stuff first, then the big bites

All in Hole wraps strategic puzzles, cozy vibes, and competitive thrills into one satisfying experience. Help Molly become the ultimate hole master — then keep collecting, decorating, and teaming up for bonuses. Ready to relax and swallow the challenge? Jump in now!

The ultimate anime action RPG is here! DRAGON BALL LEGENDS puts the power of your favorite DRAGON BALL heroes in your hands! Epic 3D visuals and animations bring your collection of heroes to life: More than 400 characters to find and train to make your ultimate team for the battles ahead. Goku, Vegeta, Trunks, Piccolo, Frieza, Broly, Majin Buu and many other heroes and villains are waiting for you! Discover a new original story based off the brand-new character designed by Akira Toriyama, the mysterious Saiyan known as Shallot! Join Shallot and your favorite DRAGON BALL characters to help save the world!

DRAGON BALL LEGENDS features action-packed anime action RPG gameplay. With intuitive fighting controls and simple card-based strategic gameplay, presented in stunning 3D animation & visuals, DRAGON BALL LEGENDS brings the anime to life on your mobile device!

From great heroes such as Goku, Gohan, Piccolo, and Krillin, to evil villains such as Frieza, Cell, and Majin Buu, all of your favorite anime DB characters are ready for battle! Summon characters from popular DRAGON BALL anime series, such as DBZ, DBGT, to DBS!

Enjoy 1 on 1 fighting action against your friends or rival players from across the globe in live PVP battles! Enter Ratings Matches with your favorite DRAGON BALL characters and earn Rating Points and Rewards! Or test your strength in non-ranking casual matches for fun battles with players of similar power.

EPIC ACTION GAMEPLAY
• Intuitively control your favori

Kill zombies, form alliances, and lead human civilization back from the brink of doom in this zombie strategy MMO!

The zombie apocalypse threw humanity into the dark ages. Now, YOU are the light in the darkness. SURVIVE by raising massive armies of machines, explosives, and gritty human soldiers. REVIVE civilization by slaying the zombie hoards, rebuilding your city, rescuing refugees, and bringing new global prosperity. THRIVE by forming alliances with other commanders from around the world, crushing your rivals, and seizing the Capital so YOU may lead the new age of humanity!

Because in Age of Origins, the walking dead may be a dangerous but human schemers and backstabbers are the real threat!

updates.name: Coin Master - Board Adventure
updates.desc:
Roll, raid, and rule the board!

Welcome to Coin Master: Board Adventure, where every dice roll takes you closer to riches, revenge, and all-out fun! Collect coins, attack villages, build your empire, and explore wild new boards full of surprises. It’s not just a board game - it’s a bold adventure!

ROLL THE DICE, MAKE YOUR MOVE
Every roll brings a new opportunity. Land on coin tiles to stack your fortune, shields to protect your village, or raid tiles to steal from your Coin Master friends! Just like a real board game, your strategy—and a little luck—will decide your fate.

BUILD YOUR WAY TO THE TOP
Use your loot to upgrade buildings, complete themed villages, and grow your collection. From fantasy kingdoms to tropical getaways, every board you explore unlocks new worlds to conquer.

ROLL AND ATTACK
Landing on the attack tile? Time to strike! Attack villages across the map, break through defenses, and send your rivals back to square one. It's payback with a bonus.

COLLECT COINS, RAID FRIENDS
Raid your friends’ boards and dig up massive treasures. Want more? Steal coins, disrupt their progress, and climb the ranks. Being nice won’t win you this game!

COLLECT CARDS, COMPLETE SETS
Love collecting? Get hooked on rare card games! Gather themed cards as you play, complete sets, and earn powerful rewards. Trade with friends to finish your collection faster.

PLAY CASUAL, COMPETE HARD
Whether you're in for a quick spin or an all-day binge, Coin Master: Board Adventure delivers fun

Welcome to Disney Solitaire, the ultimate card game that transforms classic tripeaks solitaire into an exciting experience filled with magic!

Step into the enchanting realm of Disney Solitaire, where every postcard recreates an iconic scene from the worlds of Disney and Pixar!

From the moment you start playing, you’ll find yourself immersed in colorful scenes featuring some of your favorite characters like Aladdin, Elsa, Moana and Woody.
This isn’t just another solitaire game; it’s a vibrant experience packed with excitement, strategy, and whimsical charm.

Disney Solitaire redefines the solitaire experience with innovative gameplay features. Collect unique power-ups and special cards that can change your strategy. 

Play Disney Solitaire now and step into a world where every game leads to magic, and every victory brings you closer to unlocking an enchanting scene.

With stunning visuals, engaging gameplay, and heartwarming moments, Disney Solitaire is your ticket to a magical escape. 

Don’t miss out - your adventure awaits!

Disney Solitaire is intended for those 13 and older. Disney Solitaire does not require payment to download and play, but it also allows you to purchase virtual items with real money inside the game, including random items. You can disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Disney Solitaire may also contain advertising.

You may require an internet connection to play Disney Solitaire and access its social features. You can also find more infor

updates.name: Fluffy Drop
updates.desc:
Fluffy Drop – A Cozy Puzzle Adventure Where Every Drop Counts!

Step into the softest puzzle experience with Fluffy Drop, a delightful blend of color-matching strategy and satisfying drag-and-drop mechanics. Your mission is simple yet irresistibly engaging: guide fluffy balls into matching color zones, clear the board, and bask in the joy of perfectly planned moves. Whether you're a puzzle enthusiast or just looking for a relaxing brain break, Fluffy Drop wraps logic in charm and challenges in comfort. 

Why you’ll fall in love with Fluffy Drop:

Satisfying Drag & Drop Gameplay – Simple to learn, yet deeply rewarding to master.

Hundreds of Cozy Levels – From gentle warm-ups to brain-teasing puzzles, there’s always a new challenge waiting.

Vibrant Visuals & Soothing Animations – Every color match comes to life with soft effects and smooth motion.

Strategic Depth – Plan your moves, anticipate the next drop, and create chain reactions for maximum satisfaction.

Play Anywhere, Anytime – No Wi-Fi? No problem. Enjoy the full experience offline.

Ready to drop into a world of fluffy fun?
Download Fluffy Drop today and discover why every drop is a step toward pure puzzle joy!

updates.name: Triple Match City
updates.desc:
Triple Match City - The Ultimate Hidden Objects Adventure!

Are you ready to sharpen your observation skills and test your focus in an exciting and fast-paced hidden objects game? In Triple Match City, your mission is simple yet thrilling: find hidden objects across expansive maps and match them in sets of 3 before the time runs out! Immerse yourself in this captivating scavenger hunt challenge that will keep your brain engaged and your eyes sharp.
Embark on a journey through beautifully designed maps filled with hundreds of hidden items waiting to be discovered. Every level brings a new challenge, with more intricate scenes, harder-to-find objects, and limited time to complete your goal. It’s a race against time—can you find all the objects before the clock runs out?

Key Features:
- Exciting Hidden Object Gameplay: Find and collect small objects scattered across massive, colorful maps. Match them in sets of 3 to clear them from the screen!
- Time-Based Challenges: Feel the thrill as you race against the clock to complete your tasks.
- Diverse Maps and Themes: Explore vibrant locations like crowded bustling cities, mysterious deserts, icelands, and more!
- Helpful Hints: Can’t spot an object? Use hints to reveal its location and keep moving forward.
- Zoom Functionality: Zoom in and out of the map to spot even the tiniest hidden objects.
- Relax or Challenge Yourself: Play casually to unwind, or take on harder levels to test your speed and accuracy.
- Frequent Updates: Enjoy
updates.releaseNotes:

Welcome to Cookingo, your peaceful little escape from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. In this game, cooking is more than just making food—it’s a foodie haven, where you can savor each calm and happy moment.

Your mission is simple: craft all the fresh ingredients into delightful creations.
- Chop & Slice: Feel your rhythm as you softly slice fruits and veggies.
- Whisk & Mix: Watch colors swirl and textures blend while soothing ASMR sounds wrap around you like a cozy blanket.
- Perfect Plating: Sprinkle spices, drizzle sauces, and add the finishing touches to turn every dish into a masterpiece.

Tiny sweet touches that make Cookingo your hideaway:
- Relaxing sounds that help you unwind and breathe a little easier.
- Adorable, visually enchanting dishes—each recipe has its own dreamy story.
- Made for everyone, whether you’re a food enthusiast, a casual gamer, or someone who simply loves cozy pleasures.

So, what are you waiting for? Turn your screen into a cozy kitchen, and let every cooking moment melt away your stress.

● Operations & Management
Enhance your production structures for smoother workflows. Use electricity to run your shelter more efficiently. Unlock and upgrade more structures to meet your growing needs.

● Assign Survivors
Assign jobs to your survivors, like hunters, chefs, or lumberjacks. Pay attention to their health and morale to keep productivity high.

● Resource Collection
Explore further and discover unique resources in different biomes. Gather and use every resource to your advantage.

● Multi-map & Collectibles
Travel through multiple maps to find loot and special items. Bring them back to decorate and improve your shelter.

● Recruit Heroes
Find heroes with special skills and traits who boost your shelter’s capabilities.

● Form Alliances
Team up with friends to stand against common threats, such as severe weather and wild creatures.

* Tap on three identical  tiles and connect them into triples

updates.name: Minecraft: Play with Friends!
updates.desc:
Dive into an open world of building, crafting and survival. Gather resources, survive the night, and build whatever you can imagine one block at a time. updates.name: Hole Stars: Puzzle Game
updates.desc:
Hole Stars – Scoop, Solve, and Shine

Looking for a game that’s fun, fast, and totally satisfying? Meet Hole Stars — a relaxing puzzle game where you guide a growing black hole through colorful levels, collect everything in sight, and beat the clock in style.

From tiny objects to giant surprises, every level is packed with items to collect, puzzles to solve, and obstacles to outsmart. Whether you’re in it for the challenge or the relaxing vibes, Hole Stars is the perfect break-time pick-me-up.

Easy to Play, Hard to Put Down
Swipe to move your black hole and start collecting! As you gather more, your hole grows bigger, letting you scoop up larger items and clear the board even faster. Watch out for tricky objects and blockers that’ll keep you on your toes.

Think Fast, Move Smart
Each level is a puzzle with a twist: time is ticking! Use strategy, quick thinking, and helpful level boosters to collect everything before the clock runs out. Whether you're sorting, planning your path, or just going with the flow — every move matters.

Satisfying, Soothing Gameplay
Enjoy smooth animations, crisp visuals, and gentle ASMR-style sound effects as you play. Hole Stars is built to be relaxing and satisfying — perfect for short sessions or deep puzzle streaks.

Play, Compete, Repeat
Want to challenge yourself even more? Compete with friends, rise through the leaderboard, and show off your speed and puzzle skills. It’s easy to pick up and play — but there’s always a new challenge waiting.
updates.releaseNotes:
We’re thrilled to launch Hole Stars!

Get ready to dive into a fun, fast-paced world where your black hole swallows it all. Clear levels, collect stars, and enjoy the most satisfying way to relax and compete.

We're just getting started — and you're at the center of it all.

Have you ever looked at your county's line-up from the stands and thought, "I could do a better job"? Now is your chance to prove it. County Bainisteoir is the ultimate Gaelic games sports management simulation, built from the ground up for strategy fans who live for tactical depth, player development, and match-day drama.

Take complete control of your favorite county and guide them through a challenging, multi-season legacy. From midnight training sessions to high-stakes summer afternoons, every choice you make will echo through the stands. Will you lift the ultimate silverware, or will the county board hand you your walking papers?

all.name: SKUNK'D®: Solo Dice Challenge
all.desc:
Sniff that? It’s the sweet smell of victory—or the stinky scent of getting SKUNK’D!

Welcome to SKUNK'D®: Solo Dice Challenge, the fast-paced, high-stakes digital adaptation of the popular push-your-luck family dice game. If you love dice rollers, risk-taking, and climbing the leaderboard, grab your cup and get ready to roll!

HOW TO PLAY:
1. Roll 6 dice. Score points by rolling 5s,Skunks, or special combinations (Stripes, Polecats, Megas, and the legendary Carbuncles!).
2. Put your points on the board to lock them in, or push your luck and roll the remaining dice to score even more.
3. Watch out! If you roll the dice and fail to score any points, you get SKUNK'D and lose all your points in the Den for that turn.
4. Push your luck to the limit, rack up massive points, and climb the global leaderboards to claim bragging rights over your friends!

KEY FEATURES:
• PUSH YOUR LUCK: Classic, addictive risk-reward dice gameplay that keeps you on the edge of your seat.
• SOLO CHALLENGE: Score as many points as you can, build massive combos, and chase the ultimate high score.
• FRIEND CHALLENGES: Challenge your friends directly in asynchronous Best-of-3 or Best-of-5 match series. Set a high score on your board and see if they can beat it!
• GLOBAL LEADERBOARDS: Compete with players worldwide. See where you rank among the top stinkers globally, and of course amongst your friends!
• PREMIUM MASCOT & VOICEOVER: Play along with Whiff, our animated mascot, featuring high-fidelity custom an

Relax and challenge your brain at the same time through winding and weaving.

Ideal for players who love creative handiwork, 3D puzzles, and org

all.name: Pyramid Khepri 13
all.desc:
If you enjoy matching games, you’ll love Pyramid Khepri 13.

The daily challenges feature a unique reward system that lets you win gem-studded crowns and trophies while competing against other players on the leaderboard. New daily challenge rewards are unlocked every day. Simply tap the "PLAY NOW" button to access each challenge.

This puzzle game stays fresh and challenging. Embark on a new legendary journey, complete challenges, and collect unique badges. You’ll face constant new challenges to train your brain and sharpen your skills! Enjoy unlimited daily play with this unique and challenging free solitaire game. It’s highly engaging—but remember, you still need to find the right moves to beat the challenge!

Try unique solitaire challenges and train your brain with this classic Pyramid Solitaire game (also known as the "13" game).

How to play this classic free Pyramid Solitaire game:
Pair up cards that add up to 13. J = 11, Q = 12, K = 13. Combine cards that total 13 to remove them from the board. Use the draw pile to help find the cards you need. Clear the board to win the game!

Challenge yourself to reach the top of the pyramid and clear as many boards as possible. Train your brain with this classic solitaire game.

Download Pyramid Khepri 13 now and enjoy one of the best and most popular solitaire games around!

Please contact us if you have any questions:adebola1225@gmail.com

all.name: PourPop: Water Puzzle
all.desc:
Relax and unwind with PourPop — a cozy collection of water puzzles you can play at your own pace. No timers, no fail states: just satisfying pours and that quiet click when everything lines up.

Pour water between tubes until each one holds a single color. Simple to learn, delightfully tricky as the puzzles grow.

THREE WAYS TO PLAY
- Color Sort — pour to gather every color into its own tube
- Measure — combine and pour jugs to hit an exact target amount
- Decant — split and share water to reach the goal

Hundreds of handcrafted levels ramp smoothly from gentle warm-ups to clever brain-benders. Stuck? Grab a hint, undo a move, or add an extra tube — it's your puzzle, your pace.

FEATURES
- 400+ levels across three puzzle modes
- A smooth difficulty curve — never a wall, never a bore
- Hints, undo and helpful boosts when you want them
- A daily challenge to keep your streak alive
- Earn coins, unlock achievements, track your stats
- Calm, candy-soft visuals and soothing sounds
- 100% offline — no account needed

Pour, sort, measure, relax. Pop a few puzzles whenever you need a quiet moment.

all.desc: SleighRescue is a fast-paced Christmas arcade game in which you pilot Santa's sleigh through a magical winter storm to save scattered holiday gifts before they are pulled into the center blizzard and lost forever. Hold and drag to steer across the screen, intercept falling presents such as gift boxes, candy canes, stockings, ornaments, Santa hats, and gingerbread cookies, and build high scores within a thrilling 120-second countdown. Dodge dangerous snowballs and ice spikes that drain your points, avoid frozen traps that slow your movement, and use powerful seasonal items including Golden Gifts, Lucky Bells, Christmas Clocks, Snowflake Shields, and Santa Stars to turn the tide in your favor. Chain consecutive collections to trigger Christmas Combo bonuses, survive the intense final Christmas Fever phase, unlock new sleighs by reaching higher scores, track your best runs, complete festive achievements, and prove yourself as the ultimate holiday hero in this polished portrait-mode rescue adventure designed for quick sessions, smooth controls, satisfying feedback, and endless replayability.

all.name: Pathlings
all.desc:
Every walk is an adventure waiting to happen. Pathlings is a cozy step-tracking game where your daily steps become XP, quests, and progress for a tiny buddy you'll actually care about.

CHOOSE YOUR BUDDY
Pick from three starter companions — the nature-loving Sprout, the fiery Ember, or the whimsical Bubble. Name them, walk with them, and watch them evolve through five stages as you hit your goals.

WALK TO GROW
Pathlings connects to Apple Health to count your real steps. Every day you walk, your buddy earns XP. Hit milestones along today's adventure path, complete quests, and unlock snacks and toys to keep your buddy happy.

BUILD YOUR STREAK
Stay consistent and your streak compounds — each day of a streak earns streak × 5 bonus XP on top of your quest rewards. Miss a day? Streak Shields protect your progress so one bad day doesn't reset everything.

YOUR PACE, YOUR GOAL
Set a daily step goal that fits your life — gentle, balanced, or ambitious. Pathlings grows with you, not against you.

No subscriptions. No ads. Just you and your buddy, one walk at a time.
all.coreLoop: Every walk is an adventure waiting to happen. Pathlings is a cozy step-tracking game where your daily steps become XP, quests, and progress for a tiny buddy you'll actually care about.

all.name: ChibiNekoPuzzlePark
all.desc:
ChibiNeko Puzzle Park is a cozy park-themed puzzle collection guided by adorable ChibiNeko characters. Three puzzle modes in one app. Japanese and English supported.

【Three Puzzle Modes】
■ NekoPatch
Place shape pieces to fill the grid. L- and T-pieces included. Long-press to rotate; number hints help you along the way.

■ NekoQueens
Place one kitty queen in each row, column, and color zone—without diagonal neighbors. A colorful logic puzzle with a feline twist.

■ NekoZip
Draw a trail from ① through numbered nodes and visit every cell in the park. Avoid walls and route through treat cells for extra fun.

【Random Mode 】
Tap Random in any mode for a freshly generated puzzle every time. Reset to get a brand-new layout. Endless replayability beyond the fixed stages.

【Features】
• 5 fixed stages per mode + random generation
• Free to play (ads supported, no in-app purchases)
• Free hints + optional rewarded ads for extra hints
• Star ratings based on clear time
• BGM toggle, undo, and reset
• Privacy Policy, Terms, and Support in Settings

【Perfect for】
• Quick brain breaks
• Logic puzzle fans
• Cat lovers who enjoy cute, casual games

Fill the park with puzzles—ChibiNeko is waiting!

all.name: Meowdoku!
all.desc:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.

Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
Simple Rules, Deep Strategy

The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!

Key Features
• Pure & Immersive Experience
• Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
• Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.

Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards. Why Meowdoku Will Stay on Your Phone M

all.name: Yarn Loop: Knit Puzzle
all.desc:
Yarn Loop is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game featuring colorful yarn bobbins and knitted patterns.

Bobbins move onto the conveyor and collect stitches of their own color. Each bobbin has a capacity value that decreases as stitches are picked up. When its capacity reaches zero, the bobbin disappears. If capacity remains, the bobbin is transferred to the rack and can be used again later.
 
Complete each knitted pattern by using the right bobbins in the right order.

Game Features
► Simple One-Tap Gameplay: Bobbins move smoothly through the conveyor system and collect matching stitches with ease.
► Color-Based Collection Mechanic: Each bobbin clears only the stitches of its own color.
► Capacity Management System: Every bobbin has a limited pickup value, creating thoughtful and satisfying puzzle decisions.
► Rack Reuse Function: Bobbins that still have capacity return to the rack and remain available for later use.
► Hundreds of Engaging Levels: New knitted layouts, color combinations, and puzzle arrangements appear throughout progression.
► Cozy Yarn Aesthetic: Soft textures, warm colors, and pleasant animations create a calm and enjoyable experience.

Yarn Loop offers a smooth, calm, and visually charming journey through handcrafted yarn puzzles.
all.releaseNotes: Good news, players — the latest update is here! We’ve squashed bugs, boosted performance, and added fresh polish to keep the fun going strong.

all.name: Zen Word® - Relax Puzzle Game
all.desc:
Playing Zen Word 10 minutes a day brings you incredible challenging and relaxing experiences.
 
Zen word is a challenging word game & brain game that helps to train your brain and sharpen your mind. Zen Word is much more challenging than most other word puzzle games. Unlike crossword puzzles games or word cross games or word scramble games, all words in Zen Word are uncrossed, without any logical connection that can give you hints to help you solve the puzzles.  In Zen Word, you need to search and connect the right letters to find 20 hidden words on average in each level to test your vocabulary. The length of the words is the only clue that will help you find all the words and solve the puzzles. Therefore, Zen Word has very high requirements for your vocabulary and spelling skills. All word puzzles in Zen Word are carefully designed and will definitely give you a completely different challenging experience. 

Also, Zen Word is very different from word-search games. In word search games, your objective is to find and mark all the words hidden inside the letters box. The arrangement of these words in word-search games has clear rules, even if you don't know the spelling of the words, you can still search and find all the hidden words to solve the puzzles. As you find more words, the difficulty of word search games gets easier. However in Zen Word, as you find more words, the difficulty of the game will increase sharply. all.name: Amaze GO!
all.desc:
Welcome to Amaze GO! A clean arrows puzzle game built to calm a busy mind. Every arrow points the way — what you need to do is to choose the right order. The design cuts visual noise, reduces chaos, and helps you organize thoughts as you play. Pick up an arrow. Find its lane. Repeat until the grid is yours. Enjoy the quiet flow offline anywhere and anytime.

What makes Amaze GO! great
1. Streamlined arrows puzzle that declutters the screen and the mind
2. Works offline with a clean interface that keeps attention on the board
3. Calm play loop for smart brains: think clearly, move each arrow with strategy
4. Smooth tap controls, clear path feedback, and satisfying release moments like ASMR

How to Play
- Find an arrow with a free path to the edge
- Tap to slide that arrow off the grid and open a lane for the next move
- Plan the order to secure a safe route and a clean board
- Long-Press to use Guidance to highlight directions when your path is unclear
- A wrong tap costs a heart for the level
- Clear the board to finish the level and aim for a perfect run
- Hints help focus when the grid feels tight

Why love this arrow puzzle
· Simple rules, profound strategy, and a meditative arrows puzzle
· Short breaks ease stress and sharpen focus
· The last arrow leaves the board with a satisfying mental reset
· Cognitive workout for sequencing and brain teasers
· Quiet visuals, plus a satisfying whoosh as each arrow flies off the grid — feedback that soothes instead of nags

all.name: Pixel Flow!
all.seller: Loom Games Oyun Yazilim ve Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
all.desc:
Conveyor’s ready, pigs are on standby. Tap to send a pig onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Pigs only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The pigs are ready. The cubes… not so much.

Block Out! is designed for puzzle lovers who enjoy both strategy and action. Download Block Out! now and explore the dynamic world of colorful puzzles.

all.name: All in Hole: Black Hole Games
all.desc:
All in Hole is the oddly satisfying black-hole puzzle where you guide Molly the mole on a snack-swallowing adventure. Slide a tiny hole, devour small objects to grow, and use playful physics to gobble every target treat. Whether you’re here to zen out or chase trophies, All in Hole serves up quick, colorful levels that feel great to master.

Why you’ll love it
- Smooth, tactile physics — swipe, scoop, and watch the hole snap up anything in its path
- Smart goals — sort and swallow only what’s required to clear the puzzle
- Relax or compete — chill at your own pace or enter limited-time tournaments and climb the leaderboard
- Team up — join a crew to chat, share hearts and coins, and earn sweet bonuses together
- Yummy progression — collect ingredients, unlock recipes, and decorate cakes
- Handy boosts — grab energy and time helpers for tough stages
- Fresh drops — regular events and new levels

How to play
- Drag to move the black hole
- Eat small items to grow larger
- Swallow the target treats to finish the level

Tips from Molly
- Look ahead: plan a clean route so you don’t block yourself
- Prioritize: gulp the light stuff first, then the big bites

All in Hole wraps strategic puzzles, cozy vibes, and competitive thrills into one satisfying experience. Help Molly become the ultimate hole master — then keep collecting, decorating, and teaming up for bonuses. Ready to relax and swallow the challenge? Jump in now!

Welcome to Coin Master: Board Adventure, where every dice roll takes you closer to riches, revenge, and all-out fun! Collect coins, attack villages, build your empire, and explore wild new boards full of surprises. It’s not just a board game - it’s a bold adventure!

ROLL THE DICE, MAKE YOUR MOVE

BUILD YOUR WAY TO THE TOP
Use your loot to upgrade buildings, complete themed villages, and grow your collection. From fantasy kingdoms to tropical getaways, every board you explore unlocks new worlds to conquer.

ROLL AND ATTACK
Landing on the attack tile? Time to strike! Attack villages across the map, break through defenses, and send your rivals back to square one. It's payback with a bonus.

COLLECT COINS, RAID FRIENDS
Raid your friends’ boards and dig up massive treasures. Want more? Steal coins, disrupt their progress, and climb the ranks. Being nice won’t win you this game!

COLLECT CARDS, COMPLETE SETS
Love collecting? Get hooked on rare card games! Gather themed cards as you play, complete sets, and earn powerful rewards. Trade with friends to finish your collection faster.

PLAY CASUAL, COMPETE HARD
Whether you're in for a quick spin or an all-day binge, Coin Master: Board Adventure delivers fun

all.desc:
Triple Match City - The Ultimate Hidden Objects Adventure!

Are you ready to sharpen your observation skills and test your focus in an exciting and fast-paced hidden objects game? In Triple Match City, your mission is simple yet thrilling: find hidden objects across expansive maps and match them in sets of 3 before the time runs out! Immerse yourself in this captivating scavenger hunt challenge that will keep your brain engaged and your eyes sharp.
Embark on a journey through beautifully designed maps filled with hundreds of hidden items waiting to be discovered. Every level brings a new challenge, with more intricate scenes, harder-to-find objects, and limited time to complete your goal. It’s a race against time—can you find all the objects before the clock runs out?

Key Features:
- Exciting Hidden Object Gameplay: Find and collect small objects scattered across massive, colorful maps. Match them in sets of 3 to clear them from the screen!
- Time-Based Challenges: Feel the thrill as you race against the clock to complete your tasks.
- Diverse Maps and Themes: Explore vibrant locations like crowded bustling cities, mysterious deserts, icelands, and more!
- Helpful Hints: Can’t spot an object? Use hints to reveal its location and keep moving forward.
- Zoom Functionality: Zoom in and out of the map to spot even the tiniest hidden objects.
- Relax or Challenge Yourself: Play casually to unwind, or take on harder levels to test your speed and accuracy.
- Frequent Updates: Enjoy

Believe the hype, join thousands of word game enthusiasts and download Word Search Explorer today!

all.name: Homescapes: Match 3 Games
all.desc:
Welcome to Homescapes, a truly heartwarming game from Playrix's Scapes™ series! Solve match-3 puzzles to restore a wonderful mansion on a verdant street. Exciting adventures start at the doorstep!

Beat colorful match-3 levels to renovate and decorate rooms in the mansion, unlocking ever more chapters in the exciting family story along the way! What are you waiting for? Make yourself at home!
 
The game features:

●     Unique gameplay: help Austin renovate the house by swapping and matching pieces!
●     Interior design: you decide what the house will look like.
●     Exciting match-3 levels: tons of fun, featuring unique boosters and explosive combinations!
●     A huge, beautiful mansion: discover all the secrets it holds!
●     Fantastic characters: watch them live their lives and interact with each other in the in-game social network.
●     A cute pet: meet а naughty and fluffy cat.
●     Invite your Facebook friends to help you create your own cozy atmosphere in the house!
 
Homescapes is free to play, but some in-game elements (including randomized items) can be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this option, simply turn it off in your device's Restrictions menu.
 
Enjoying Homescapes? Learn more about the game!
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/homescapes/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/homescapes_mobile/
 
Questions? Contact our Tech Support by sending an email to support@playrix.com.

PLUS

Choose any level you like. Play easier levels to challenge your brain, or try expert levels to give your mind a real workout. Sudoku.com has some features that make the game easier for you: hints, auto-check, and highlighted duplicates. You can use them, or complete the challenge without their help – it's totally up to you! Welcome to “Toon Blast,” a free match-3 adventure that combines fun and strategy. Join Bruno Bear, Cooper Cat, and Wally Wolf in blasting cubes and solving puzzles without Wi-Fi. Immerse yourself in this captivating world, enjoy relaxing puzzle-solving, and embark on an unforgettable adventure. “Toon Blast” is more than a game; it’s a journey of joy and relaxation, free for all to enjoy.

In “Toon Blast,” you’ll find a lot of levels and new episodes. Each level has different goals and fun obstacles. Use special boosters to move up levels, and earn stars for rewards. Make a team, compete, and stay in the game with help from teammates. The game is easy to start but gets challenging, and you can play it on your phone or tablet.

Their high-stake heists unfold in beautifully designed posters, revealing their story every 50 levels.

all.name: Hole Stars: Puzzle Game
all.desc:
Hole Stars – Scoop, Solve, and Shine

Looking for a game that’s fun, fast, and totally satisfying? Meet Hole Stars — a relaxing puzzle game where you guide a growing black hole through colorful levels, collect everything in sight, and beat the clock in style.

From tiny objects to giant surprises, every level is packed with items to collect, puzzles to solve, and obstacles to outsmart. Whether you’re in it for the challenge or the relaxing vibes, Hole Stars is the perfect break-time pick-me-up.

Easy to Play, Hard to Put Down
Swipe to move your black hole and start collecting! As you gather more, your hole grows bigger, letting you scoop up larger items and clear the board even faster. Watch out for tricky objects and blockers that’ll keep you on your toes.

Think Fast, Move Smart
Each level is a puzzle with a twist: time is ticking! Use strategy, quick thinking, and helpful level boosters to collect everything before the clock runs out. Whether you're sorting, planning your path, or just going with the flow — every move matters.

Satisfying, Soothing Gameplay
Enjoy smooth animations, crisp visuals, and gentle ASMR-style sound effects as you play. Hole Stars is built to be relaxing and satisfying — perfect for short sessions or deep puzzle streaks.

Play, Compete, Repeat
Want to challenge yourself even more? Compete with friends, rise through the leaderboard, and show off your speed and puzzle skills. It’s easy to pick up and play — but there’s always a new challenge waiting.
all.releaseNotes:
We’re thrilled to launch Hole Stars!

Get ready to dive into a fun, fast-paced world where your black hole swallows it all. Clear levels, collect stars, and enjoy the most satisfying way to relax and compete.

We're just getting started — and you're at the center of it all.
